data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — _abort_stale_rebase checks REBASE_HEAD inline; _cleanup_stale_git_state checks both REBASE_HEAD+MERGE_HEAD inline; _squash_rebase_recovery uses git diff --diff-filter=U inline; merge-state.sh is already available at $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/lib/merge-state.sh
